module.name: no-unsafe-code-generation
module.description: Disallow eval, Function constructors, string timers, and vm code execution APIs.

scenarios.name: should allow function timer callbacks and shadowed global names
scenarios.given: code using function callbacks for timers or local bindings named Function

scenarios.name: should report eval, Function, and string timer callbacks
scenarios.given: code that executes source strings through globals or timer callbacks
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call or constructor

scenarios.name: should report Node vm execution APIs
scenarios.given: code importing vm namespaces or vm execution helpers
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the vm call or constructor
